citation.description: _backend.py defines TicketTransport, OutboundMapper, InboundMapper, FieldSanitizer, IdentityConvention, SupportsLinks, SupportsComments, SupportsIncremental, SupportsAbsenceProbe, Backend protocols plus RemoteRef, BackendEnvError, BackendAssigneeNotFoundError. test_backend_contract.py runs against both JiraBackend and FakeBackend. ADR 0035 §(d) documents the canonical-comparison corollary.

criteria.criterion: ADR 0035 §(d) pins the interface (S1); Backend Protocols, RemoteRef, contract suite passing both JiraBackend and test-only FakeBackend exist (S2) — landed, changes 900/901.

citation.description: ReconcilerConfig has backend: str = 'jira'. _backend_registry.py select_backend() reads config.reconciler.backend and constructs the backend. test_backend_registry.py verifies select_backend returns JiraBackend by default.

criteria.criterion: Backend chosen via config.reconciler.backend through the registry; default 'jira' reproduces prior behavior end-to-end (S3) — landed, change 902.

citation.description: adapters/jira/ contains acli.py, acli_cli_ops.py, acli_graph.py, acli_rest.py, acli_subprocess.py, adf.py, outbound_fields.py, comment_limits.py (all 8 vendor modules). No AcliClient( construction in core modules (applier.py, fetcher.py, run_differs.py, _attestation.py). apply_inbound_records.py uses backend.vendor instead of hardcoded 'jira' literals.

criteria.criterion: All transport construction and provider literals route through the port (S4); the 8 vendor modules physically reside under adapters/jira/ with loaders repointed and no re-export shims (S5) — landed, changes 903/905.

citation.description: test_backend_neutrality.py exists with: (a) no-inline-AcliClient gate for applier/fetcher/run_differs/_attestation; (b) apply_inbound_records single-jira-literal gate; (c) module-level mapper import gate for outbound_differ/inbound_differ/apply_inbound; (d) full-tree AST walker for fetcher/applier/apply_handlers/_attestation/inbound_probe/outbound_differ/outbound_links/reconcile_check; (e) reconcile_check by-path load gate; (f) vendor snapshot key gate for outbound_differ; (g) lazy-load literal sweep with inbound_fields.py exemption. Core modules verified to have no adapters.jira imports.

criteria.criterion: Zero vendor reach-through in core: every package-root src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/*.py module has NO adapters.jira/acli_subprocess import, NO 'rebar_reconciler.adapters.jira' lazy-key literal, and NO by-path load of a vendor sibling — single recorded exemption: inbound_fields.py — verified by test_backend_neutrality.py, green on main.

citation.description: outbound_field_diff.py compute_update_fields() canonicalizes snapshot via inbound_mapper.map_remote_to_local(), diffs in local shape, maps back via outbound_mapper.map_fields_to_remote(). outbound_links.py uses links.map_remote_links() and links.link_payload_for_relation(). ADR 0035 §(d) has the canonical-comparison corollary at lines 138-155. outbound_differ.py imports nothing from adapters.jira.

criteria.criterion: Canonical comparison: the outbound field and link differs compare only canonical shapes; vendor payloads are built/consumed exclusively via port calls; ADR 0035 §(d) records the principle — verified by canonical-diff children's characterization and neutrality tests, green on main.

citation.description: test_no_src_module_over_the_hard_cap() enforces the 800-LOC cap across all src/rebar modules. .github/module-size-limit.txt contains '800'. Child tickets 97f2 (closed, Gerrit 926, LLM-Review+1/Verified+1) and 4af8 (closed, Gerrit 914, LLM-Review+1/Verified+1) have attestations of green CI runs in their comments.

criteria.criterion: All src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/*.py modules respect the 800-LOC module-size gate (.github/module-size-limit.txt); the full suite is behavior-preserving (all children's make lint && make typecheck && make test green; each landed with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1).
